Bash(/Library/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.10/bin/python3 -c "
import json
data = json.load\(open\('output/lineage_graph.json'\)\)
print\(f'Nodes: {len\(data[\\"nodes\\"]\)}'\)
print\(f'Edges: {len\(data[\\"links\\"]\)}'\)
print\(\)
print\('--- Cross-language edges \(XSLT → Java\) ---'\)
for link in data['links']:
    if 'xslt::' in link['source'] and 'java::' in link['target']:
        print\(f'  {link[\\"source\\"]}'\)
        print\(f'    → {link[\\"target\\"]}'\)
        print\(f'    type: {link[\\"type\\"]}'\)
        print\(\)
" 2>&1)
